title: Plant Based Smoky Indian Jalebi
description: A briny, silky, and cozy Indian dish featuring kosher salt and a smoke-hot flavor, made with plant-based ingredients in the form of jalebi.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, kosher salt, smoked paprika, and garam masala.
In a separate bowl, mix the sugar, plant-based yogurt, and lemon juice until well combined.
Slowly add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Gradually add the water to the batter and mix until it reaches the desired consistency.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a piping bag or a plastic bag with a corner cut off, pipe the batter into the hot oil in a circular motion.
Fry the jalebi until golden brown and crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the jalebi from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the jalebi warm and enjoy.
